title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
